name: Completed OIA requests
definition: Requests with a completed outcome during a reporting period.
public_data_limitations: Public FYI records can identify many public-platform completions but not all agency OIA requests.
Some closures, withdrawals, or administrative completions may not be visible publicly.
exclusions: Agency completions not represented by observable correspondence.
official_reporting_caveat: FOI-O NZ output is not official PSC reporting; it is a public FYI-derived indicator for research and reconciliation only.
